metadata.description: Colby's public Copilot plugins — skills, custom agents, and MCP integrations.

plugins.name: hello-copilot
plugins.description: A minimal starter plugin: one skill plus one custom agent. Copy it as a template for your own plugins.

plugins.name: filesystem-mcp
plugins.description: Example MCP-only plugin that runs a filesystem Model Context Protocol server scoped to the plugin directory via ${PLUGIN_ROOT}.

plugins.name: consolidate-dependabot
plugins.description: A skill that reviews a repo's open Dependabot PRs across any ecosystem, validates each bump, and rolls the safe ones into a single superseding consolidation PR.
